name: Mocha Ice Cream Cake
recipeIngredient: Ladyfingers; enough to line the sides of a 9-inch springform pan
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the ladyfingers around the sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Mix together the coffee and chocolate ice creams.
3. Add the instant coffee granules, coffee-flavored liqueur, and crushed toffee bars to the mixture.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
5. Spread a thin layer of chocolate sauce on top.
6. Freeze until set.
7. Before serving, spread whipped cream over the cake.
8. Serve immediately; do not let the cake defrost before serving.
